cleavage agent: digested by adding 20 μl 50 mM Tris-HCl buffer (pH 8.0) supplemented with 2 M urea, 5 mM DTT and 100 ng Sequencing Grade Trypsin
enrichment method: biotin-isofalcarintriol (structure 15, for synthesis see Supplementary Figs. 5, 6) was used in two independent pulldown assays with mass spectrometric analysis
fragmentation method: analyzed using a Q Exactive HF mass spectrometer with HCD fragmentation
instrument: eluting peptides were directly ionized by electrospray ionization Orbitrap Fusion Lumos mass spectrometer
ionization type: eluting peptides were directly ionized by electrospray ionization
reduction reagent: 5 mM DTT and 100 ng Sequencing Grade Trypsin
reduction concentration: 5 mM DTT and 100 ng Sequencing Grade Trypsin
